description: R16 - Schedule F FX version by Co

miscTables.descr: Co
SchedF
Sched F pivot
Sched F Name
GrandTotalRight
A/C/D
AffCat,Sched F Name
Amount
T:U
U
Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex5,GL,GLdesc,Co,TP,TPname,ReinName,Flex4,Flex6,Division,Location,PC,Pcdesc,BusCat,Contract,uwyr,Amt3,Amt4
A/C/D,FX,SchedF,AffCat,GL,GLdesc,Co,TP,TPname,Reinsurer,ReinName,Sched F Name,NAIC,Fed ID,RSG Ceding Co,RSG Ceding Co Name,BusCat,Contract,uwyr,GL Amt,Amount
Co,GL
update TransX set Contract = 'UNKNOWN', ReinName = 'UNKNOWN' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co in ('2002','2003') and Contract like 'AR%' and GL like '13%'
update TransX set Contract = 'UNKNOWN', ReinName = 'UNKNOWN', uwyr = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('1320000','1320001')

update TransX set ReinName = m.CEDANT_REINSURER_CODE from TransX t inner join [stm-dwhse-01].[ORION].dbo.[GFS_Dimensions] m on t.Co = m.LEGAL_ENTITY and t.Contract = m.CONTRACT_NO and t.UWYR = m.UW_YEAR where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not t.Contract in ('','UNKNOWN') and not ReinName in (select z.CEDANT_REINSURER_CODE from [stm-dwhse-01].[ORION].dbo.[GFS_Dimensions] z where z.CONTRACT_NO = t.Contract and z.UW_YEAR = t.UWYR and z.LEGAL_ENTITY = t.Co)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TP, ReinName, BusCat,Contract,uwyr,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Flex1) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TP, ReinName, BusCat,Contract,uwyr,0 as Amt1, 0 as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, 'pass9' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, TP, ReinName, BusCat,Contract,uwyr)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt3 = 0 or Flex1 <> 'pass9')
update TransX set Flex1 = 'Ceded', Flex2 = 'no', Flex5 = 'non-affiliate', Flex6 = '', Amt4 = Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'Assumed' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat >= '20' and BusCat <= '29'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'Assumed' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '13%'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'Direct' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '10'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'yes' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '%96' or GL like '%97' or GL like '%98')
update TransX set Flex3 = m.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on substring(t.GL,1,3) = m.ID and t.Flex1 = m.Field1 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'GL Sched F'
update TransX set Amt4 = -Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,1) = '2' and not (Flex1 = 'Ceded' and substring(GL,1,2) = '28')
update TransX set Amt4 = -Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ((substring(GL,1,1) = '4' and Flex1 <> 'Ceded') or (substring(GL,1,1) = '5' and Flex1 = 'Ceded'))

update TransX set ReinName = f4.CEDANT_REINSURER_CODE from TransX f1 inner join (select f3.contract_no, f3.cedant_reinsurer_code from [stm-dwhse-01].[ORION].dbo.[GFS_Dimensions] f3 inner join (select CONTRACT_NO, max(UW_YEAR) as UW_YEAR from [stm-dwhse-01].[ORION].dbo.[GFS_Dimensions] group by COntract_no) f2 on f2.contract_no = f3.contract_no and f2.uw_year = f3.uw_year group by f3.contract_no, f3.cedant_reinsurer_code) f4 on f1.contract = f4.contract_no where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not f1.Contract in ('','UNKNOWN') and not ReinName in (select z.CEDANT_REINSURER_CODE from [stm-dwhse-01].[ORION].dbo.[GFS_Dimensions] z where z.CONTRACT_NO = f1.Contract and z.UW_YEAR = f1.UWYR and z.LEGAL_ENTITY = f1.Co)
update TransX set TP = Field1 from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on ReinName = Descr where  KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'TP Sched F' and TP is NULL
update TransX set TPname = m.Name from TransX t inner join TPs m on t.TP = m.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Flex4 = coalesce(m.Name,''), Flex6 = coalesce(m.SchedFname,''), Division = m.NAIC, Location = m.FedID from TransX t inner join Brokers m on t.ReinName = m.Broker where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex6 = coalesce(Field2,'') from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on ReinName = Descr and Co = Field1 where  KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'Reins Sched F'
update TransX set Flex6 = coalesce(Field2,'') from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on Contract = Descr and Co = Field1 where  KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'Contract Sched F'
update TransX set Flex5 = 'affiliate' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP <> ''
update TransX set Flex6 = Flex4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 = ''
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex6 = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Flex6,'') in ('','UNKNOWN')
update TransX set Flex6 = coalesce(m.SchedFname,'') from TransX t inner join TPs m on t.TP = m.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 = ''

update TransX set PC = substring(cast(f2.ceding_co_id as varchar(255)),1,10), PCdesc = substring(f3.name,1,50) from TransX f1 inner join [stm-dwhse-01].[ORION].dbo.[Contracts] f2 on f1.contract = f2.contract_no and f1.uwyr = f2.uw_year inner join [stm-dwhse-01].[ORION].dbo.[Companies] f3 on f2.ceding_co_id = f3.company_id
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and len(GL) = 3

insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex5,ReinName,Flex6,Amt3,Amt4) select '[batchID]',x.Flex1,'prorate',x.Flex3,'non-affiliate',x.ReinName,x.Flex6,round(x.Amt3/z.Amt3*y.Amt3,2),round(x.Amt4/z.Amt4*y.Amt4,2) from (select Flex1,Flex3,ReinName,Flex6,round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3,round(sum(Amt4),2) as Amt4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = 'non-affiliate' and Flex6 <> '' group by Flex1,Flex3,ReinName,Flex6) x inner join (select Flex1,Flex3,Amt3,Amt4 from (select Flex1,Flex3,sum(Amt3) as Amt3,sum(Amt4) as Amt4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 = '' group by Flex1, Flex3) a where Amt3 <> 0 or Amt4 <> 0) y on y.Flex1 = x.Flex1 and y.Flex3 = x.Flex3 inner join (select Flex1,Flex3,Amt3,Amt4 from (select Flex1,Flex3,sum(Amt3) as Amt3,sum(Amt4) as Amt4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = 'non-affiliate' and Flex6 <> '' group by Flex1,Flex3) b where Amt3 <> 0 or Amt4 <> 0) z on z.Flex1 = x.Flex1 and z.Flex3 = x.Flex3

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex5,Amt3,Amt4) select '[batchID]', Flex1, 'prorate', Flex3, 'non-affiliate', Amt3, Amt4 from (select Flex1, Flex3, round(sum(-Amt3),2) as Amt3, round(sum(-Amt4),2) as Amt4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = 'prorate' group by Flex1, Flex3) f2 where Amt3 <> 0 or Amt4 <> 0
